runTitle: GraphRAG variant direct supervisor recheck after ai-engine-00308 (RAG auto + advisor tool required)
coveredSurfaces: Cloud Run /api/ai/supervisor variant topology direct probe (3 attempts)

expertAssessments.rationale: Routing/tool reliability improved: sampled direct probes consistently used searchKnowledgeBase with successful finalAnswer. However latency remains very slow and quality policy flags persist.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Tune advisor response format and reduce long-tail latency before closing P1.

pendingImprovements.title: Topology variant direct supervisor path still has quality/latency stabilization gap
pendingImprovements.note: Hard failures are not reproduced in QA-20260413-0280 sample, but latency (35-86s) and advisor-format quality flags remain. Keep open until consistency and latency targets are met.
